response:
bat the historian analyzed the data to determine the number of average purchases that could be made with the total number of tokens issued by the village in that year. the village issued 240 tokens, each worth 3 pence, so the total value of the tokens is 720 pence. since the average purchase cost was 18 pence, the number of average purchases is 720 divided by 18, which equals 40. the calculation shows that 40 average purchases could be made with the total number of tokens issued by the village in that year.  

p.p.s. lake
